scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.build:dist: npm run build && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/webapp dist/server && rsync -a frontend/dist/ dist/webapp/ && rsync -a --exclude node_modules backend/ dist/server/ && cp package.json package-lock.json dist/
